description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set within a rectangular, walled lot featuring a manicured lawn, trees, and a driveway. The structure has a modern, flat-roof design with clean lines and large windows, allowing for ample natural light. The front yard includes a paved walkway leading to the main entrance, flanked by landscaped greenery and a prominent tree. The backyard appears to have a small pool or water feature, as well as additional green space and privacy hedges. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with darker trim and fencing. The property is bordered by a solid perimeter wall and is accessible via a driveway gate.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped yard, and a private driveway, set within a walled lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped front yard, and driveway gate.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, side wall, and partial view of the backyard pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool area, and privacy hedges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the backyard, pool, and side landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
